privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the official OpenToonz sample dataset, specifically the dwanko_run.tnz scene file. The data is real and originates from the opentoonz_sample GitHub repository. Task metadata accurately reflects the constraints defined in the task description: to output a 320x320 transparent GIF at the specified output path.
